info.name: Wejha Student API
info.description:
Complete collection of every /api endpoint exposed to the Wejha student mobile/web app (Laravel backend). All API routes live in routes/web.php under /api/*, authenticated via a custom Bearer token (not Sanctum) issued at register/login/google-login and validated by ApiTokenMiddleware (alias `api.token`).

**Auth flow**: call Register or Login (or Google Login) first — the response's `student.api_token` is auto-saved to the `api_token` environment variable by a test script. All protected requests below use `Authorization: Bearer {{api_token}}`.

**Response envelope**: every endpoint returns `{ "success": boolean, "message": "...", ...data }`. Error responses are `{ "success": false, "message": "..." }` with a matching HTTP status code.

**Note**: CSRF protection is excluded for `api/*` in `bootstrap/app.php` (`validateCsrfTokens(except: ['api/*'])`) so these routes are safe to call directly, unlike other POST routes in routes/web.php.

item.name: Auth

request.description:
Create a new student account.

Validation:
- name: required|string|max:255
- email: required|email|max:255|unique:users
- password: required|string|min:6
- phone_number: nullable|string|max:20
- gender: nullable|in:male,female
- academic_year: nullable|string|max:50
- school_name: nullable|string|max:255
- specialization: nullable|in:scientific,literary,علمي,أدبي

On success (201) the user is auto-assigned the `Student` role, given `api_token`, `status=active`. Response: `{ success, message, student: { id, name, email, api_token } }`.

exec: pm.test('status is 201 or 422 (email may already exist)', () => {

request.description:
Log in with email + password.

Validation:
- email: required|email
- password: required|string

Responses:
- 200 success: `{ success, message, student: { id, name, email, api_token } }`
- 401: invalid credentials
- 403: account not active

Sends a WelcomeEmail on the user's very first login (when `last_login_at` was previously null).

Log in / auto-register via Firebase Google Sign-In.

Validation:
- id_token: required|string (Firebase ID token obtained client-side from Google Sign-In)

Backend verifies the token via `firebase.auth`, extracts email/name/picture. Creates the user (assigns `Student` role) if new, otherwise updates `last_login_at`/`avatar`.

Responses:
- 200: `{ success, message, student: { id, name, email, api_token, avatar } }`
- 400: could not extract email from Google token
- 401: invalid/expired Firebase id_token

Set `google_id_token` in the environment to a real Firebase ID token before running (obtained from the mobile app's Google Sign-In flow — cannot be generated from Postman).

item.description: Public endpoints (no Bearer token needed) for student account creation and login. All return `student.api_token` which the test scripts save to the `api_token` environment variable for use by the protected requests below.

item.name: Events (Public)

request.description:
List all published, upcoming events (status=published, event_date/time in the future), ordered by event_date ascending.

Response 200: `{ success, events: [{ id, title_ar, title_en, description_ar, description_en, type (seminar|workshop|exhibition), speaker, event_date, event_time, venue, capacity, banner_image_url, cover_image_url }] }`

Get a single event's details by its UUID.

Response 200: `{ success, event: { id, title_ar, title_en, description_ar, description_en, type, speaker, event_date, event_time, venue, capacity, banner_image_url, cover_image_url } }`
Response 404: `{ success: false, message: "الفعالية غير موجودة / Event not found." }`

item.description: Public event browsing endpoints — no authentication required.

item.name: Event Booking

request.description:
Register the authenticated student for an event.

Validation (RegisterForEventRequest):
- event_id: required|uuid|exists:events,id
- source: string|in:web,mobile,admin (optional, defaults to "web")

Business rules (RegistrationService):
- 400 if event not found
- 422 if event is fully booked (EventCapacityExceededException)
- 400 if registration_opens_at is in the future / registration_closes_at has passed
- 422 if user already registered for this event (DuplicateRegistrationException)

On success (201): status is `pending` if the event `requires_approval`, otherwise `approved`; a unique `qr_hash` is generated (used later for attendance scan) and an EventRegistrationEmail is sent.

Response 201: `{ success, message, registration: { id, status, qr_hash } }`

Cancel a registration by its ID (path param, UUID string — not format-validated by the route).

Sets the registration's status to `cancelled` (no server-side guard against cancelling an already checked-in registration).

Response 200: `{ success: true, message: "تم إلغاء التسجيل بنجاح." }`
Response 400: `{ success: false, message: "تعذر إلغاء التسجيل." }` (registration not found) or the raw exception message.

item.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{api_token}}`. Lets a logged-in student register for / cancel a registration to an event.

item.name: Attendance

request.description:
Record attendance check-in by scanning a registration's QR ticket hash. Typically called by a staff/organizer's scanner client (still uses the same `api.token` auth as students — the authenticated user is recorded as the scanner).

Validation (ScanAttendanceRequest):
- qr_hash: required|string|max:255
- device: nullable|string|max:255 (defaults to "Web Camera")
- event_id: nullable|string|exists:events,id (if provided, must match the ticket's actual event)

Business rules (AttendanceService):
- 400 if qr_hash doesn't match any registration (InvalidQRCodeException)
- 400 if event_id provided but doesn't match the ticket's event
- 422 if already checked in (DuplicateRegistrationException) — message includes previous check-in time/operator
- 400 if registration status isn't `approved` yet

On success: registration status becomes `checked_in`, an Attendance row is created.

Response 200: `{ success, message, attendee: { name, email, school, time } }`

item.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{api_token}}`. Used to check students in at an event via their registration QR code.

item.name: Surveys

request.description:
Submit answers to a survey (pre- or post-event evaluation). `{{evaluation_id}}` is the `event_evaluations.id` (path param), not the event id or survey_template id.

Validation (SubmitSurveyRequest):
- answers: required|array|min:1
- answers.*.question_id: required|uuid|exists:survey_questions,id
- answers.*.response_text: nullable|string (use for text/textarea/number/date/email/phone/rating questions)
- answers.*.response_json: nullable|array (use for multiple_choice/checkbox questions)

Business rules (SurveyResponseService):
- 400 if evaluation not found
- 403 if the evaluation/survey template is not active (SurveyClosedException)
- 400 if the user isn't registered for the event
- 400 if evaluation_type is "post" and the user hasn't checked in (attended) yet
- 400 if a question doesn't belong to this survey template, or a required question is left empty
- One SurveyResponse row is created per answer; re-submitting the same question for the same evaluation will fail on a DB unique constraint (user_id, event_evaluation_id, question_id)

Response 201: `{ success, message, response_count }`

item.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{api_token}}`. Submits a student's answers to a pre- or post-event survey/evaluation.

item.name: Email

request.description:
Send an arbitrary generic email (used for custom notifications from the app). Requires a valid `api_token`, same as any other authenticated student — there is no extra role/permission check on this route, so any logged-in student can trigger emails to any recipient. Flag this with the backend team if that's not intended.

Validation (SendEmailRequest):
- recipient: required|email|max:255
- subject: required|string|max:255
- body: required|string (rendered as raw HTML inside the branded GenericMail template)
- extra_data: nullable|array (currently unused by the template, reserved for future use)

Response 200: `{ success: true, message: "تم إرسال البريد الإلكتروني بنجاح." }`
Response 500: `{ success: false, message: "فشل إرسال البريد الإلكتروني. يرجى المحاولة لاحقاً." }`

item.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{api_token}}`. Generic transactional email sender.
